sys_script_client.description:
Display a modal that accepts reviewer comments, details will vary based on a form action. Some form actions will show a Pre-Complete template that warns about automatically marking subtasks as complete as well. However, if task has no subtasks then no need for the Pre-Complete template to be shown. 2.8.5 | 2023-09-07 | raj | STRY0136615 - STRY0136615 - STRETCH-PLACEHOLDER- Header UI Control 2.8.0 | 2022-08-11 |raj | DFCT0011152 - Reviewer comments does NOT display when user "Approve and Sign" or "Concur and sign" a task/template task 2.8 | 2022-06-27 | raj | STRY0123191 - Warning Modal- Rejecting an Approval Subtask will close all "Approval Dependent Tasks" - removed reject from the modal open 2.8.0 | 2022-05-14 | raj | STRY0120264 - Task Form- Signature Acknowledgement checkbox display on Main Task Form 2.8.0 | 2022-05-11 | raj | STRY0116490 - Tasker Types update wording - Approval and Concur types STRY0116490 v2.7 2.7.0 | 2021-10-18 | mmcc | STRY0108860 - DIA- Completed from Top Task Notification
2.6 STRY0093231- Tasker Type "Approval with signature, Approve & sign Acknowledgement modal has spelling error
2.5 Patch 3 STRY0085333 - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Send to Review - Response Comments - "Reviewer" field Editable STRY0085338 - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Send to Review - Response Comments - "Reviewer" field Read-Only STRY0086943 - RESPONSE/REVIEWER - Response & Reviewer Section Displays/Hidden on Approval and Concur Task Types in Completed, Closed, Incomplete and Cancel states STRY0089415 - "Send to Review" Modal - Review Required flag displays read-only on Modal for Assigned Member
2.5.20 - Patch 2 STRY0079375 - UI - STRETCH - Modal for Additional Comments - NonConcur UI Action
sys_script_client.messages: Tasker - Title - Send to Review for Task Tasker - Title - Nonconcur Tasker - Title - Nonconcur & sign Tasker - Title - Reject Assignment Tasker - Title - Reject Primary Assignee for Task Tasker - Title - Approve & sign Acknowledgement for Tasker - Title - Approve Tasker - Title - Concur & sign Tasker - Title - Concur Tasker - Title - Abstain Tasker - Title - Send to Rework Tasker - Title - Mark Complete for Task Tasker - Please enter Additional Comments Tasker - Please enter Response Comments Tasker - Please enter Reviewer Response Tasker - Please enter Rework Comments Tasker - Please enter Review Comments Tasker - Modal Save Changes Message
sys_script_client.name: Task - onSubmit - Modal Open
